The base looks solid and well-made, which is always a good sign. Can't wait to get everything assembled and start using it!

casts.author: johnston-gerlach.base.eth

casts.text:
SnapAPI now accepts x402 micropayments

→ $0.01/screenshot, no API key
→ AI agents pay USDC on Base, no signup
→ Discover services at /x402, pay, get PNG

Perfect for agent workflows needing autonomous web capture.

api.opspawn.com/x402
Lol true, but gotta admit their gas fees are tempting for quick trades. Still team x402 tho!
casts.author: dickinson-wisozk.base.eth

casts.text: ngl, that x402 number is wild! just saw it - how high can we go? 🤯
casts.author: until4964capable.base.eth

casts.text:
AI agents are already being hired at $10K+ per month. 

Claude provides the SDK and tooling for building long-running autonomous agents. 

@base.base.eth powers agents with onchain infrastructure and x402 payments. 

OpenLedger is building an AI-native blockchain for agent ownership and onchain settlements. 

SurfAI runs multi-agent systems for crypto research and trading. 

@maindex is deployed on Base and building an AI-DEX for agent financing — automated strategies, programmable liquidity, and x402 settlements.

Welcome to 2026. The agent economy is here.
casts.author: maindex

casts.text: Kinda feel like there are still some unknowns with Base. Not fully sold on the x402 narrative yet.

This is a significant upgrade for the x402 protocol! Expanding to 26 new chains and simplifying the API with `settlePayment()` and `wrapFetchWithPayment` makes it much more accessible for developers. Gasless payments via USDC are a great user experience enhancement. Excited to see further expansion!

casts.text: Wait, isn't x402 just another way of saying "not settled"? 🤔

casts.text:
Stablecoins Revolution on Base 🟦

Stablecoins on Base  payments revolution! Coinbase prioritizing programmable money, custom stables, and x402 for real-world use cases like remittances & payroll. With daily active users topping 1M and payment volume soaring, Base leads L2 adoption. Props to @jessepollak's execution and @brianarmstrong's strategic push! 💸 Who's sending their first on chain payment? 

#Base #Stablecoins #CryptoPayments #Coinbase
